author: David Gaylord
review: Easy communication and very transparent during our efforts to break our lease terms due to relocation. Amy and her team were fantastic to deal with, and provided above and beyond results when it came to finding a new tentant. Maintence

review: Ive worked with Utopia Property Management for 2 years now and I believe thats a good amount of time to get to know a company and the folks within. Amy Krutsinger and the team at the Bellingham office have been extremely helpful and

author: Stephanie Weiher
review: The Utopia Maintenance Team is quite good overall. They are prompt (requests are usually taken care of within 2 days of submitting through the online portal), friendly, and do quality work. The one thing they could do better is more

author: The_real_uncleskunkle
review: Shayli moved us in and was very helpful and professional during the entire process. Shes quick to answer any questions and emails. Amy and Jennifer are also very friendly and helpful. When I had questions and went into the office they both

author: Robyn Keller
review: Recently rented a property and Utopia was quick to respond, kind, and professional.

author: Gina Startup
review: Oly from Utopia is an excellent manager, she is very busy, but still found time to help with a few issues I had. She said our building was her "zen" place and we enjoy talking with her when she has a few minutes to visit. Utopia made a wise choice when they hired her.

author: Madalyn Thomas
review: I had an absolutely wonderful experience working with Jennifer and her team. While going through the process of being added to a currently established lease as a new roommate, the team was able to guide me through this process quickly and efficiently.

author: Henry White
review: Utopia always has quality properties listed and they are great to rent from. Shayli is quick to respond to any questions I have and everyone is so pleasant to speak with on the phone. Highly recommend working with them if you can!

author: Dr.Brian Jarrett
review:
Excellent service!  The communication and interaction is first class.

Just dealt with Oly in Maintenance.  First class service.  Thank you, Oly.  Very much appreciated.

author: Dan James
review:
I got a call back right away after leaving a voice message. It was refreshing to  chat and have my questions answered.
Shayla in the office was very sweet personable and helpful
Thanks Dan P

author: Marianne Dillon
review: I recently had an issue with weather stripping on my front door. They sent Tracy from maintenance to address the issue. He was wonderful: very knowledgeable, prompt, thorough and went above and beyond to solve my problem and thoroughly

author: Marcus Burns
review: Utopia is a company that does not care about their tenants in any way. We rented a home with Utopia and had an unfortunate water leak at the property. When Utopia was notified of the leak and the water being turned off to prevent further

ownerResponse.text:
Mr. Burns,

My apologies, upon speaking with you it was apparent that I did not have all the information when I responded to the review last week.  Thank you for talking the time to speak with me today about this situation.

I am very sorry to hear there wasn't a follow-up by my staff related to the 8 days without the use of the property while the owner completed repairs.  We are sorry that when your son returned, and he had to clean up after the contractor and hook up the dishwasher and washer himself.  In the 7 months since the incident, we have made improvements to our service by hiring a maintenance team of technicians and a coordinator to improve responsiveness to our customers.

Based on our conversation and after some additional research I think we agreed that this was just an unfortunate chain of events - likely a power outage that must have caused the reduced temperatures and the pipe to break.  After more research with the property manager, I found notes that at the time the owner was in disagreement about the fault, but later our PM confirmed he in fact he had changed his mind after visiting the property.  Again, my apologies, but these notes had not made it to the account.   The credit had been missing.  We will process the credit and close out your move out statement with a revision.

Finally, we take feedback seriously and will continue to improve our systems and follow through.  I do hope you will change your opinion of our service in the future and accept our apologies for the mistake and inconvenience.

Thank you,
Jennifer Mydland
Utopia Management

author: Ahmad Safi
review: This have been very frustrating and negative experience. We have submitted our application in Mid-October. We have been waiting since to hear back but no communication happened from their side. So, I tried to reach out multiple times and

ownerResponse.text:
Ahmad, we are sorry to hear that you have had an unsatisfactory experience. The property you applied for is no longer under our management, and when we spoke on the phone earlier today, and I explained the situation, I communicated that we would be happy to refund your group's application fees. I am sorry I didn't receive your previous voicemail; I will be looking into this. If there are any other available properties you are interested in, we are happy to help you with that.

Best Regards, 
Amy Krutsinger

author: Christine McDaniel
review: Utopia Management has been great. We are extremely happy in our new home.

author: Cameron H
review:
Oly with Utopia Management has been a fantastic representative for the company! All of my questions were answered and now I have more concrete plans going forward. Thank you for such a productive call!
- Sincerely, Cameron

author: Kaitlyn Thomas
review: I have always felt valued when speaking with the Utopia team! They are very genuine people and have always made me a priority. Their communication is clear and efficient. I would give them 6 stars if I could!

author: Cindy Church
review: The gentleman who did the winterization inspection was very nice and even came back later that day because I was not home. The only thing to change is a notice of day and time they are coming. This is the second time I was not notified of

author: M M
review: Blatantly ignored by Amy K. I had one single question about a property I was interested in and her initial email back was just a canned response saying that property is still available. I asked the same question twice via email and it got

ownerResponse.text:
Dear Sir,

We are very sorry that there was a communication difficulty during the time you expressed interest on the property.  We researched and were having problems with voicemails being routed and received.  Amy did not receive the communication and again we are sorry about the lack of response.  We did not know you were urgently requesting information.  During the same week this the owner decided to manage their own rental which is why the ad disappeared.  We were instructed to pull the listing which is out of our control.  I am happy to help you find another property if you would be willing to give us the opportunity.  When we realized what had happened, we refunded your application fee immediately.  Please let us know if you have not received it.  Again, our deepest apologies.

Regards,
Jennifer Mydland
Utopia Management-Bellingham

author: Wesley Drilias
review: We had an incredible experience with Utopia. They were compassionate and flexible through a family emergency and a difficult move out process. During our tenancy they were prompt with communication and repairs. By far the best experience with a rental agency we have had.

author: Brad Anderson
review: We had to rush into a home after dealing with the worst rental company in Bellingham (cough cough, Lakeway). We ended up signing with Utopia and their Bellingham branch was so kind to us. We missed the deadline by a hair for the first house

author: Alivia Eng
review: Renting from Utopia has been a smooth process. Amy is very friendly and refreshingly responsible compared to other renting experiences I have had in Bellingham as a student.

author: Dan Kuwitzky
review: Oly met us this morning to inspect the condition of our condo rental. She was professional and courteous, listening carefully to the needs of our tenant while giving helpful feedback to us as owners. Keep up the great work, Oly!

author: Triston Smith
review: Utopia Management was the best management company I have rented from yet. When it came to maintenance needing to be done they always were quick about finding help and letting me know what was going on. They always responded to me quickly and were always so polite.

author: Kendyl Bourland
review: Utopia's team is extremely service oriented and professional. We are so grateful to them for helping us find the perfect place. A special shout out to Amy, Brittany, Ashleigh, and Madeline! Thank you so much!

author: Brandon Collins
review: Please read all the way through...I hope anyone who plans to rent from Utopia reads this before signing anything. Hopefully, I was just an anomaly and if you do choose to rent from them, they treat you better.

ownerResponse.text:
Hi Brandon,
Our properties are not advertised as utilities included.  Each of them has special guidelines set up by the owners.  The utilities were advertised on the website $50 fee for Water/Sewer/Garbage/Yardcare which reported to all the listings.  I am sorry there was confusion with your Welcome letter at the time of move-in.   Since you pointed out the mistake, we have reviewed the documents that were given at your move-in and made these corrections.  An old welcome letter had been used by a new associate on our team which resulted in the misinformation.  At the time of signing the lease had you brought the discrepancy to our attention we would have addressed it immediately.  With the autopay there were 2 autopayments set up by each of you causing additional money to be paid on your account.  We reset your portal which fixed this problem and stopped it from happening.  We do not have control over these payments because of security protocols we are not able to change or edit someone's account.   Your housemate seemed happy with the resolution when we followed up with them.  Thank you - Bellingham Branch

Jennifer Mydland, CAPS
Bellingham Sr.  Branch Manager

author: Kenneth Graves
review: Relocating is ways difficult, especially from another state.  A few months before our move date I started an earnest search for a new place to call home in Bellingham.  We applied for several rentals with multiple property management

author: Heidi Lea
review: Working with Utopia is wonderful! They have a great team and are very responsive in handling tenant concerns with speedy fixes!

author: Dakshina Cherwoo
review: Worst management and big liars. They take advantage of people and dont guide them correctly. Please for future renters dont to any lease takeover from this management. They will overcharge you for the things what you have not done. They

ownerResponse.text:
Hello Dakshina,

When taking over a lease, the incoming tenant is responsible for the condition of the property for the term of the contract even if the dates of the lease started prior to your move in date.  The previous management company, MMR's contract stated that you were agreeing to become responsible for the previous tenants/damage when taking over their lease; therefore, the owner is entitled to be reimbursed for these damages/cleaning costs.  Utopia completed a fair and complete accounting of your deposit, paying very close attention to the move in inspection and lease documents at the time of the physical inspection.  Utopia attached images of all damages and items that were left behind to show the reason for each charge.  This was included with the mailed itemization.

I am sorry to hear that you felt unsafe in the neighborhood and had experienced a rodent problem.  We were not aware that you were experiencing any problems with criminal activity or rodents.  We must be informed immediately when there is a problem at the property so that we can help find a solution.  I am sorry we were not able to do that for you.  I hope that brings you some clarity and we wish you the best.

Bellingham Utopia Management

author: John Montenegro
review: Great people to help out with your property. I am in the military and have been so grateful for the help of Jennifer and Amy while I am moving to another state. Thank you!

author: Danny White
review: Was hoping to get the second door bell installed. The  Neighbor love me something to eathing to eat on the porch because I couldn't hear the doorbell. So I was just wondering when that was gonna happen?

review: I havent seemed to find a reliable management company until Utopia. Considering they probably deal with a lot of people, they always seem to get back to me in a timely manner.
